title: pack.yaml
description: Contract for a framework pack manifest at packs/<id>/pack.yaml. A pack carries one assessment framework as data: rubrics, evidence types, question bank, optional calc pack, report spec and coverage manifest.

id.description: Pack id, e.g. mdr-governance-v3. Matches the packs/<id>/ directory name and framework.pack in engagement.yaml.

version.description: Semver. Packs version independently of the plugin.

id.description: Scale identifier, e.g. iam-0-5. framework.scale in engagement.yaml must equal this.

levels.description: Map of integer level 0..5 to its label. Default ladder: 0 Innocent, 1 Aware, 2 Developing, 3 Competent, 4 Optimising, 5 Excellent.

items.description: subjectId in NN_camelCaseName form, e.g. 01_scheduleAdherence. Ledger keys, rubric file names and all NN_ prefixed engagement files use it.

minimumSustained.description: The minimum sustained maturity level the framework expects.

calcPack.description: Whether the pack ships calculation engines under calcPack/.

complianceMatrix.description: Whether the compliance matrix track applies to this framework.

directOverIndirect.description: Default weight multiplier for Direct over Indirect evidence, overridable by framework.aggregationWeights.

highOverLow.description: Default weight multiplier for High over Medium confidence; Low weighs the reciprocal.
